body: The MQTT broker auth store may not propagate after reprovision; verify with a direct paho-mqtt connect probe before changing route code. Look for CONNACK rc=0 in the response.
petro_backend overrides the DB MQTT port 1883 to 443 over WSS at /api/v1/mqtt-ws. Match this when the route fails.
Do NOT add Redis. We removed Redis 2026-03 in favor of in-process caching. Any architected prompt should explicitly warn against re-introducing it.
Secret-redaction safeguards live in daemon/mnemo/safeguards.py. Output that may leave the daemon (paste-bound prompts) must pass through redact_text first.
